name: Ladon
description: Ladon — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Access Control.

seo.title: Ladon Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Ladon analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Ladon is a Identity / Auth / User Management tool.
cons: Auth migration is complex and risky
review.best_for: Apps needing user login, SSO, or MFA
review.not_for: Static sites or apps with no user accounts
